titleStmt.title: SII 23.399: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 399. (A.R. No. 399 of 1907.) Koḍumaḷūr, Mudukulattur Taluk, Ramnad District Kumiḷīśvara temple—on the two door-posts of the entrance

summary.p: Portions of the inscription both at the beginning and at the end are lost. Hence the name of the king is not clear, but the regnal year is given as the 4th, probably of Māṟavarman Sundara Pāṇḍya I. The record states that at the request of Aiyaṉ Maḻavarāyaṉ, the king granted three villages Koṟṟūr, Kaṇṇippēri and Uḻaiyūf as dēvadāṉa-iṟaiyili to the temple of Uttama Pāṇḍya-Īśvaramuḍaiyār at Mēlai-Koḍumaḷūr alias Uttama Pāṇḍyanallūr in Vaḍatalai-Śembi-nāḍu for meeting the expenses of the midday service instituted in the temple under the name Vīramiṇḍaṉsandi by Araiyaṉ Yādavarāyaṉ of the place. The rate of taxes inclusive of several dues like antarāyam, viniyōgam etc was fixed (to be paid to the temple) at 3/8 kāśu on every mā of wet land, 3/4 of the above on kuṟuvai, half on Aippaśikuṟuvai, and one fourth on lift irrigated land, 1(1/4) tiramam on sesamum and similar crop growing land. The king is said to have been seated on his throne called Maḻavarāyaṉ in his palace at Madurai while he issued the order.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nāliṉāl māṭa
kkuḷakkiḻ matu
raikkoyil
paḷḷiyaṟaik
kūṭattup paḷ
ḷippiṭa maḻava
rāyaṉil Eḻunta
ruḷiyiruntu vaṭa
talaic cempi nāṭṭu me
laik koṭumaḷūrāṉa Uttama
pāṇṭiyanallūr Utta
mapāṇṭiya Īśvaramuṭai
yār koyil tāṉattār ce
yyat tiruvāymoḻintaru
ḷiṉapaṭi Ivvuttamapāṇ
ṭiya Īśvaramuṭaiyārkku I
ivvūr Araiyaṉ meḷappecu
vāṉāṉa yātavarāyaṉ Uccicca
nti Amutu ceytaruḷa kaṇṭa
viramiṇṭaṉ cantikkut tirup
paṭimāṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum
nivantaṅkaḷukku Innāṭṭu
koṟṟūrum kaṇṇiperiyum
Uḻaiyūrum Āka Ivvūrkaḷ nāṉ
kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnila
m nañcey puṉceyyum nat
tamum toṭṭamum Uḷ
paṭṭa nilattil paḻan
tevatāṉap paḷḷiccanta
m nikki nikkiyuḷḷa nilam A
ntarāyamum viṉiyokamum
taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārā
cciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum
pañcupili cantuvikkirakap
peṟu maṟṟum Eppe
yarpaṭṭiṉavum Uṭ
paṭa nālāvatu mutal te
vatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyā
ka Iṟuppatāka Iṭappe
ṟaveṇumeṉṟum Ivvūrkaḷ
Iṟukkumiṭattu Innāṭiṟu
kkuṅkolāl nilamaḷantu pa
yirpāṟttu viḷainta nilattu
kku Antarāyamum viṉiyoka
mum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriya
vārāycciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum
Uṭpaṭa māttāl kāle Arai
kkāl kācum mutal virapāṇṭi—
—m kuṟuvai viḷainta nila
ttukku Ivvaricaiyil
Oṉṟumukkālum Aip
pacikkuṟuvai viḷainta
nilattukku Oṉṟupātiyu
n tulā Iṟaittu viḷain
ta nilattukku Oṉṟukālu
m Eḷ varaku tiṉaippulli
ṅku viḷainta nilattukku mā
ttāṟ tiramam Oṉṟekālum
Iṟuppatāka Iṟaik kaṭṭap
peṟaveṇumeṉṟum Aiy
yaṉ maḻavarāyaṉ nama
kkuc coṉṉamaiyil Itte
vaṟkku yiyātavarāyaṉ kaṇṭa
viramiṇṭaṉ cantikkut tiru
paṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum
nivantaṅkaḷukku yinnāṭṭu
koṟṟūrum kaṇṇipperiyum
Uḻaiyūrum Āka Ivvūrkaḷ nāṉ
kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nila
ttil paḻan tevatāṉa pa
ḷḷiccantam nikki Uḷḷa ni
lam Antarāyamum viṉi
yokamum taruvatāṉa Ac
cum kāriyavārāycciyum
veṭṭi pāṭṭāḻvi pañcu
piliyum cantuvikkiraka
peṟum maṟṟum Eppeya
rppaṭṭiṉavum Uḷpaṭa
Ivvāṇṭumutal teva
tāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy
Iṟuppatākavum I
vūrkaḷ Iṟukku miṭattu
Innāṭiṟukkuṅ kolāl nila
m Aḷantu payir pārttu vi
ḷainta nilattukku Antarāya
mum viṉiyokamum taruvatā
ṉa Accum kāriyavārācciyum
veṭṭipāṭṭamum Uṭpaṭa
māttāl kāle Araikkā
l kācum mutal virapāṇṭi1)The rest of the inscription is lost.
Digital edition of SII 23.399 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
